allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "try { $null = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(''scripts/manage-osdfir-lab.ps1'', [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors.Count -gt 0\) { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.ToString\(\) } } else { Write-Host ''No parse errors found'' } } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message }")
